title: L'abbé Constantin
writer: Hector Crémieux, Pierre Decourcelle, Julien Duvivier
actors: Jean Coquelin, Pierre Stéphen, Claude France
plot: Poor abbé Contantin, he is devastated at the news: to think that two American ladies have bought the local manor where he has always been welcome! Worse, Mrs. Scott and her cousin Bettina are protestant. But the good priest soon r...
